overall.description: A video game scene from Skyrim showing a rainy dusk exploration of a rocky mountain cliff. The camera approaches and circles a sabre cat feeding on a body near a cave entrance before moving away to pan across the stormy wilderness landscape.

agents.ego_description: moving carefully along the rocky cliff edge in heavy rain

entered.detail: tall moss-covered stone pillar marking the cliff edge
jagged rock face providing partial shelter from the rain
dark silhouetted mountains visible through the rain and mist

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy mountain cliff edge with heavy rain falling. The camera moves forward along a dirt path bordered by a mossy stone pillar on the left and a rocky cliff wall on the right, with distant mountains barely visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: cave entrance with predator and prey remains

events.description: sabre cat comes into view standing over a dead body near the cave entrance
camera begins circling around the sabre cat to observe from different angles
sabre cat growls and looks around alertly while standing over the kill

agents.ego_description: cautiously circling the large predator to observe its behavior from multiple angles

notable_agents.action: sabre cat with large fangs standing over a dead body, occasionally looking around and growling

entered.detail: dark opening in the rock wall behind the predator
corpse of a humanoid figure lying on the ground near the sabre cat
loose stones and boulders near the cave entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera discovers a sabre cat standing over a fresh kill near a cave entrance. The predator is positioned under a rock overhang that provides shelter from the rain. The camera slowly circles the animal, which growls and looks around alertly, while the dead body lies on the blood-stained ground nearby.

events.description: leaving the cave area and sabre cat behind, entering open mountain terrain
camera pans across the valley to reveal the expansive stormy landscape

agents.ego_description: moving away from the cave and panning across the mountainous wilderness to take in the view

entered.detail: dense pine forest covering the lower mountain slopes
deep valley with a river visible through the mist
leafless gnarled tree on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Leaving the sabre cat and cave behind, the camera moves into the open mountain wilderness. The scene opens up to reveal a vast valley with distant forests and mountains shrouded in storm clouds and rain. The camera pans across the desolate landscape, showing the expansive terrain before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, rain-swept mountain path into a vast, storm-shrouded wilderness. It begins by pushing forward along a dirt trail bordered by a mossy stone pillar and a rocky cliff wall, with distant peaks obscured by a heavy haze. As the camera advances, it discovers a sabre cat standing over a fresh kill beneath a sheltered rock overhang, slowly circling the alert predator and the blood-stained ground near a cave entrance. The scene then opens up as the camera leaves the cave behind, moving out into the open mountain air to reveal a wide valley filled with distant forests. Finally, the camera pans across the desolate, expansive terrain under a canopy of dark storm clouds and falling rain.
